g.text: Millwright-Overseer Workflow — Sequence (simplified, mo commands only)
Each "Millwright" arrow folds in helpers (progress.sh, todo.sh,
blueprints.sh, review.sh, commits.sh, frontmatter.sh, validate-on-write hook).
stage-3 chain and stage-6 review session run isolated.
primer.md and review-context.md are required first
reads; canonical files (requirements / config / summary / todo-list) are on-demand.
ordering, Stage 4 change-summary body, Stage 6 finding clusters. Sub-agents write
artifacts; reply is ≤20 lines; no central state mutations.
Bounded: hunks first, ≤3 callers/callees, skip generated.
Frame diagrams from change-summary.md + targeted re-reads.
No iteration cap. Overseer ends with `approve`.
review-context.md, change-summary.md, diagrams/); resets runtime fields.
Preserves blueprints/current/ (incl. primer.md). Never touches git.
Same as Stage 4 auto-trigger. Stage 3+ only.
